title: Simply 3D
description: A Pack to make certain utility blocks 3D, but keeping it vanilla-like
body:
## Simply 3D

This pack turns the utility blocks into 3D models, but does not over do it.  
I only use 1/0.75/0.5/0.25 indents or raises to keep inline with the same 3D style as the item frame.


![A nice render of all the blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F8BTcrd9/images/fa390bb9e5488906868352d335de5a4208ce5869.png)

Want more like this check the page out for all the extra additions, like lanterns and other blocks!
[![Shileds io badge](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/hWEZnfJs?color=Green&label=Simply%203D%20Extras%20Dowloads%3A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply3d-extras)  
Click to go to the page!

<details>
<summary>Blocks That Have A Model</summary>

- Crafting Table
- Cartography Table
- Smithing Table
- Stone Cutter
- Loom
- Bookshelf
- Lectern
- Furnace
- Blast Furnace
- Smoker
- Barrel
- Bee Hive
- Bee Nest
- Composter
- Caldron
- Respawn Anchor
- Lodestone
- Enchanting Table

</details>

This pack could work with a lot of other pack's as it still uses the vanilla textures and only modifys the models, as long as a pack doesn't change positions of certain details it would work.  
> Make sure this texture pack is on-top of all the other packs.


> Thanks to Isometric renders for their great mod to make these renders
